mapper.select: SELECT EML_VRF_SN, EML_VRF_EMAIL, EML_VRF_PURPOSE_CD, EML_VRF_CODE_HASH, EML_VRF_STATUS_CD, EML_VRF_EXPIRES_AT, EML_VRF_LAST_SENT_AT, EML_VRF_FAIL_CNT, EML_VRF_RESEND_CNT, EML_VRF_RETRY_AT, EML_VRF_VERIFIED_AT, EML_VRF_USED_AT FROM EMAIL_VERIFICATION WHERE EML_VRF_EMAIL = #{email} AND EML_VRF_PURPOSE_CD = 'EMVC0001' ORDER BY EML_VRF_SN DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT EML_VRF_SN, EML_VRF_EMAIL, EML_VRF_PURPOSE_CD, EML_VRF_CODE_HASH, EML_VRF_STATUS_CD, EML_VRF_EXPIRES_AT, EML_VRF_LAST_SENT_AT, EML_VRF_FAIL_CNT, EML_VRF_RESEND_CNT, EML_VRF_RETRY_AT, EML_VRF_VERIFIED_AT, EML_VRF_USED_AT FROM EMAIL_VERIFICATION WHERE EML_VRF_SN = #{verificationId} AND EML_VRF_PURPOSE_CD = 'EMVC0001' FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMAIL_VERIFICATION ( EML_VRF_EMAIL, EML_VRF_PURPOSE_CD, EML_VRF_CODE_HASH, EML_VRF_STATUS_CD, EML_VRF_EXPIRES_AT, EML_VRF_LAST_SENT_AT, EML_VRF_FAIL_CNT, EML_VRF_RESEND_CNT ) VALUES ( #{emlVrfEmail}, 'EMVC0001', #{emlVrfCodeHash}, 'EMVC0003', #{emlVrfExpiresAt}, #{emlVrfLastSentAt}, 0, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT EML_VRF_SN, EML_VRF_EMAIL, EML_VRF_PURPOSE_CD, EML_VRF_CODE_HASH, EML_VRF_STATUS_CD, EML_VRF_EXPIRES_AT, EML_VRF_LAST_SENT_AT, EML_VRF_FAIL_CNT, EML_VRF_RESEND_CNT, EML_VRF_RETRY_AT, EML_VRF_VERIFIED_AT, EML_VRF_USED_AT FROM EMAIL_VERIFICATION WHERE EML_VRF_EMAIL = #{email} AND EML_VRF_PURPOSE_CD = 'EMVC0002' ORDER BY EML_VRF_SN DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMAIL_VERIFICATION ( EML_VRF_EMAIL, EML_VRF_PURPOSE_CD, EML_VRF_CODE_HASH, EML_VRF_STATUS_CD, EML_VRF_EXPIRES_AT, EML_VRF_LAST_SENT_AT, EML_VRF_FAIL_CNT, EML_VRF_RESEND_CNT ) VALUES ( #{emlVrfEmail}, 'EMVC0002', #{emlVrfCodeHash}, 'EMVC0003', #{emlVrfExpiresAt}, #{emlVrfLastSentAt}, 0, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT EML_VRF_SN, EML_VRF_EMAIL, EML_VRF_PURPOSE_CD, EML_VRF_CODE_HASH, EML_VRF_STATUS_CD, EML_VRF_EXPIRES_AT, EML_VRF_LAST_SENT_AT, EML_VRF_FAIL_CNT, EML_VRF_RESEND_CNT, EML_VRF_RETRY_AT, EML_VRF_VERIFIED_AT, EML_VRF_USED_AT FROM EMAIL_VERIFICATION WHERE EML_VRF_CODE_HASH = #{tokenHash} AND EML_VRF_PURPOSE_CD = 'EMVC0002' ORDER BY EML_VRF_SN DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE EMAIL_VERIFICATION SET EML_VRF_CODE_HASH = #{codeHash}, EML_VRF_STATUS_CD = 'EMVC0003', EML_VRF_EXPIRES_AT = #{expiresAt}, EML_VRF_LAST_SENT_AT = #{sentAt}, EML_VRF_RESEND_CNT = EML_VRF_RESEND_CNT + 1, EML_VRF_UPDT_ID = 'SYSTEM' WHERE EML_VRF_SN = #{verificationId} AND EML_VRF_STATUS_CD = 'EMVC0003'
UPDATE EMAIL_VERIFICATION SET EML_VRF_STATUS_CD = 'EMVC0006', EML_VRF_UPDT_ID = 'SYSTEM' WHERE EML_VRF_SN = #{verificationId} AND EML_VRF_STATUS_CD IN ('EMVC0003', 'EMVC0004', 'EMVC0007')
UPDATE EMAIL_VERIFICATION SET EML_VRF_STATUS_CD = 'EMVC0004', EML_VRF_VERIFIED_AT = #{verifiedAt}, EML_VRF_UPDT_ID = 'SYSTEM' WHERE EML_VRF_SN = #{verificationId} AND EML_VRF_STATUS_CD = 'EMVC0003'
UPDATE EMAIL_VERIFICATION SET EML_VRF_FAIL_CNT = EML_VRF_FAIL_CNT + 1, EML_VRF_UPDT_ID = 'SYSTEM' WHERE EML_VRF_SN = #{verificationId} AND EML_VRF_STATUS_CD = 'EMVC0003'

UPDATE EMAIL_VERIFICATION SET EML_VRF_STATUS_CD = 'EMVC0007', EML_VRF_RETRY_AT = #{retryAt}, EML_VRF_UPDT_ID = 'SYSTEM' WHERE EML_VRF_SN = #{verificationId} AND EML_VRF_STATUS_CD = 'EMVC0003' AND EML_VRF_FAIL_CNT >= 5
UPDATE EMAIL_VERIFICATION SET EML_VRF_STATUS_CD = 'EMVC0005', EML_VRF_USED_AT = #{usedAt}, EML_VRF_UPDT_ID = 'SYSTEM' WHERE EML_VRF_SN = #{verificationId} AND EML_VRF_STATUS_CD = 'EMVC0004'
